---
title: "Research"
format: html
---
 
## Journal Articles
**Spada R**, Moritz L, Rommel J, Cerroni S, Meuwissen MPM, Dalhaus T <br> 
**Behavioral Preferences and Price Risk Management in Agriculture: A Systematic Literature Review**, *Journal of Agricultural and Applied Economics*. Published online 2026:1-25. [doi:10.1017/aae.2026.10044](https://doi:10.1017/aae.2026.10044)

Moritz L, **Spada R**, Rommel J, Dalhaus T, Cerroni S<br>
**Risk preferences and other (ignored) behavioral factors in fertilizer management decisions: A systematic literature review**, *Journal of Behavioral and Experimental Economics*, Volume 121, 2026, 102524, [doi: 10.1016/j.socec.2026.102524](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socec.2026.102524)
